title: Comment from Rocha, David, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
The remaining US states that are not live on FHIR APIs need acceleration to adopt and align with the latest FHIR IGs at scale (such as the Da Vinci FHIR IGs, CARIN Alliance FHIR IGs, Gravity Project FHIR IGs) to catalyze nationwide interoperability in Medicaid interoperability infrastructure.

The remaining US territories that are not live on FHIR APIs will also need acceleration to adopt and align with the latest FHIR IGs at scale.

CMS and ASTP/ONC need to monitor FHIR IG adoption by US states and territories.

Some of the potential areas can include:
How many states are adopting the latest Da Vinci (such as PDex, CDex, PCT) and CARIN IGs?
Only ___ / 50 states have adopted Da Vinci CDex IG
____ / 50 states have adopted Da Vinci Postable Remittance IG
_____ / 50 states have adopted CARIN Digital insurance cards IG
The same questions can be applied to US territories:
Only ___ / 6 territories have adopted Da Vinci Plan Net/Directory IG
___ / 6 territories have adopted CARIN Real time pharmacy benefit check (RTPBC) IG
____ / 6 territories have adopted Gravity SDOH Clinical Care IG
